task_name: Nginx Access Log - HTTP Status Code Distribution
notes: Agent correctly parsed all 1000 entries and produced accurate counts/percentages for all status codes (200/206/304/403/404), proper category grouping (2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx), identified top 5 error IPs, and included paths/health assessment as required. Markdown formatting is excellent. Minor deductions: created duplicate report files (status_code_report.md and status_code_report_1.md) showing unnecessary iteration, and included Python script in output when only final report was needed. Analysis is sound and exceeds baseline requirements in presentation quality.
